acceptance: The release digests match the committed lock, SBOM, and provenance files.
Annotated tag v0.5.24 is created from the release commit and pushed without modifying v0.5.23.
Local and remote distribution checks validate the v0.5.24 tag as one immutable evidence unit.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

executionDecision.reason: The release mismatch is bounded: publish a new tag whose checked-in evidence matches its declared release tag.

guidelines: Do not rewrite or move historical release evidence.
Keep release metadata, generated evidence, and the immutable tag internally consistent.

constraints: Do not rewrite v0.5.23 or any historical archive.
Publish the release files and tag from the same commit.
Keep the Work Item archive immutable after completion.
intent.problem: The mainline CI smoke run rejects the current release declaration because release.json claims v0.5.23 while the updated supply-chain evidence belongs to the new mainline commit and cannot be retrofitted into the existing immutable tag.
intent.rationale: A new v0.5.24 evidence unit preserves release provenance and lets the distribution gate compare the tag contents against the declaration instead of accepting current-branch evidence as historical evidence.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm v0.5.23 remains unchanged, v0.5.24 contains the exact evidence files, and distribution validation inspects the tag rather than the working tree.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized continued remediation, commit, tag, push, and release handling.

riskAssessment.reason: The change creates a new immutable release unit and must not rewrite the existing v0.5.23 tag.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Release metadata and evidence digest consistency

evidence: Remote v0.5.23 remains present and unchanged while v0.5.24 was added.
make check-release-distribution passed against the public v0.5.24 tag.

sources.reason: Declares the immutable release tag and digests for one published release unit.
Carries the release tag and provenance inputs consumed by distribution verification.
Regenerated SBOM must describe the exact release commit and remain digest-consistent.
Existing committed lock file is part of the release evidence unit and must remain digest-consistent.
Defines the tag/worktree evidence consistency gate.
Remote workflow results provide post-push release and distribution verification.

title: 建立 v0.5.24 不可变发布证据单元
